idea: Natural gas demand spike from unseasonable cold snap detection

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature anomaly for US population centers through weather_series adapter

behavior: Daily minimum temperatures drop >15% below 30-day rolling average in winter months, signaling heating demand surge and natural gas consumption pressure.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities and energy infrastructure see immediate margin expansion from peak demand pricing and capacity utilization.

trade_logic.entry: When US population-weighted temperature anomaly drops below -2 standard deviations from seasonal norm for 2+ consecutive days
trade_logic.exit: When temperature anomaly recovers above -1 standard deviation or after 7 trading days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Winter weather volatility is seasonal and repeats reliably; unseasonable cold snaps occur multiple times per winter season.

idea: Google Trends surge in 'mortgage refinance calculator' signals rate-sensitive financial stress

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'mortgage refinance calculator' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Household financial decision-making spikes when mortgage rates move sharply; refinance inquiry volume predicts consumer confidence and housing demand shifts 1-2 weeks ahead.

market_impact.rationale: Rising refinance inquiry volume signals rate shock and housing affordability stress, which historically precedes financial sector weakness.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly search volume exceeds 80th percentile of 52-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: When search volume falls below 60th percentile over 2 consecutive weeks or after 14 days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Rate volatility is endemic to markets; mortgage rate moves trigger search spikes reliably every 3-4 weeks on average.

idea: Weekly EV charger network density jump in rural counties

data.source: OpenChargeMap charger counts by county through openchargemap adapter

behavior: Rural county EV charger deployments cluster in specific weeks as infrastructure grants roll out; rapid county-level density changes signal local economic stimulus and tech adoption momentum.

market_impact.rationale: Infrastructure build-out and manufacturing for EV charging hardware drives industrial production and materials demand.

trade_logic.entry: When a county's week-over-week charger count increases by >5 net new units and density is >20% above county 52-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when density falls below 15% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Federal and state EV infrastructure programs release deployment tranches in predictable waves; clusters occur 2-3 times per quarter.

idea: Freight rail car utilization bounce after seasonal trough

data.source: Association of American Railroads weekly freight car orders and loads through html_table adapter

behavior: Post-holiday seasonal freight collapse (Q1) reverses sharply as spring manufacturing ramps; rail car utilization jumps >15% week-over-week signal economic recovery confidence.

market_impact.rationale: Rail utilization surge indicates industrial production recovery and demand acceleration across consumer goods and materials.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly freight car loads exceed 52-week average by >8% after 4+ weeks below average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks of sustained above-average loads or after 21 days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal freight cycles repeat annually; Q1-to-Q2 transition produces reliable utilization spikes multiple times per year in the dataset.

idea: RSS news volume spike on corporate bond downgrades signals credit stress rotation

data.source: RSS feed counts mentioning 'credit downgrade' OR 'bond rating cut' through rss_count adapter

behavior: Daily spike in downgrade-related news articles (>150% of 20-day average) predicts 3-5 day financials sector weakness as credit risk reprices.

market_impact.rationale: Downgrade news cascades trigger flight-to-quality and de-risking in credit-sensitive financials.

trade_logic.entry: When daily RSS count exceeds 150% of 20-day moving average for 'credit downgrade' keywords
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when RSS count normalizes below 110% of average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Credit events and rating changes occur multiple times per month across corporate universe; news spikes reliably follow.

idea: Google Trends surge in 'logistics job openings' signals labor shortage in freight

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'warehouse job' OR 'truck driver jobs' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Weekly spikes in job search interest for logistics roles correlate with labor shortages and wage inflation pressure; signals upcoming freight cost increases.

market_impact.rationale: Labor shortage signals compress margins for transportation and warehousing-dependent industrials.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly search volume exceeds 75th percentile of 52-week range for logistics job keywords
trade_logic.exit: When search volume falls below 60th percentile for 2 consecutive weeks or after 14 days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal labor demand in logistics peaks predictably; search spikes occur weekly during peak hiring seasons (Q4, spring).

idea: VIX-to-realized volatility contraction signals mean reversion opportunity in large caps

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for SPY and VIX close through price_only adapter

behavior: When VIX futures curve inverts (short-term > long-term) while 20-day realized vol on SPY is <50% of VIX level, market is overpricing tail risk; mean reversion long bias.

market_impact.rationale: Volatility contraction and fear premium collapse drive equity risk appetite rotation into growth and technology.

trade_logic.entry: When VIX closes >15% above 20-day realized volatility of SPY and VIX is in top quartile of 252-day range
trade_logic.exit: When VIX-to-realized ratio normalizes to median or after 7 trading days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Volatility term structure inversions and fear premium spikes occur 2-3 times per month in normal market regimes.

idea: Weekly spike in 'food bank demand' Google Trends signals consumer staples demand surge

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'food bank near me' OR 'food assistance' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Food bank search interest spikes when unemployment rises or benefit cliffs hit; trailing indicator of demand for value-priced staples; signals XLP sector support.

market_impact.rationale: Increased food bank searches correlate with higher staples consumption and discount retailer foot traffic.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly search volume exceeds 70th percentile of 52-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: When search volume drops below 55th percentile for 2 consecutive weeks or after 14 days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Benefit payment cycles and seasonal unemployment create predictable search patterns every 2-3 weeks.

idea: FRED unemployment insurance claims weekly print beats expectations triggers defensive rotation

data.source: FRED series ICSA (Initial Claims) weekly through fred_series adapter

behavior: When weekly initial jobless claims exceed consensus forecast by >5% (using 4-week smoothed trend), markets reprices labor risk; defensive sectors outperform 3-5 days.

market_impact.rationale: Claims beats signal economic softening and consumer income pressure; discretionary spending faces headwinds.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly ICSA print >5% above 8-week moving average and >110% of prior year same week
trade_logic.exit: When ICSA normalizes back within 2% of 8-week average or after 10 trading days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market volatility produces claims surprises multiple times per quarter; seasonal patterns are well-established.

idea: Earthquake activity surge in oil-producing regions signals supply disruption risk premium

data.source: USGS earthquake magnitude and location data for Texas, Oklahoma, New Mexico through earthquake_activity adapter

behavior: When seismic activity (M>3.5) near shale basins increases >200% vs. 30-day average, energy markets price in production disruption risk; crude rallies 2-3%.

market_impact.rationale: Earthquake risk near drilling operations creates supply uncertainty and commodity risk premium expansion.

trade_logic.entry: When daily earthquake count in oil-producing regions exceeds 200% of 30-day rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when earthquake count normalizes below 130% of average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic clusters in shale regions occur sporadically but reliably several times per year; each triggers 2-5 day crude rallies.
